settings.title: Book settings
settings.description: If you want to change name or cover you should check this out.

verticalsManagement.title: Verticals management
verticalsManagement.description: To create new text versions, new Wiki Sections or rearrange your existing verticals you'll need to go here.

config.title: Vertical configuration
config.description: Specific to this concrete vertical. You can enable different modes or analysis for this exact vertical, like spellcheck, readability, enable Wiki Marks. Or turn on Move Mode or Scroll Sync.

sizeHandle.title: Size handle
sizeHandle.description: Drag this handle to resize verticals.

tours.title: Help tours
tours.description: If you want to enable this or another tour again, go to the Main Menu –> Account –> Help Tours and check the tour that you are interested in.

addContainer.title: Add blocks
addContainer.description: Split your text into logical blocks (it's easier to move and sort blocks after), add illustrations and comment blocks (comment blocks will be ignored while exporting).

addSpine.title: Add Spine
addSpine.description: Spine will be visible in all versions of your texts (per example Spine can be a Chapter). It will help to keep the structure of your text, no matter which version you're working on.

addContainer.title: Add blocks
addContainer.description: Split your text into logical blocks (it's easier to move and sort blocks after), add illustrations and comment blocks (comment blocks will be ignored while exporting).

spellcheck.title: Spell check
spellcheck.description: Choose the language to start spell check. Without language chosen the check will not start.

pageFormat.title: Page format and statistics
pageFormat.description: To properly count potential page count of your masterpiece you need to choose page format.
